content: goose v3.27.1 (github.com/pressly/goose/v3). Migration files use -- +goose Up and -- +goose Down markers. Convention: backend/db/migrations/. Run via: go run cmd/migrate/main.go. Supports -- +goose NO TRANSACTION for DDL. For complex PL/pgSQL: -- +goose StatementBegin / StatementEnd. Commands: goose postgres $DATABASE_URL up/down/status. For Railway: set DATABASE_URL env var pointing to private Postgres network URL.
